post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests

patch.description:
Save the R2 avatar URL returned after a successful presigned upload.
The actual file upload happens client-side directly to R2.

get.description: List active sessions for the current user.

delete.description: Revoke all sessions except the current one.

post.description: Create new user without the need to be logged in.

get.description: Get a specific user by id.
Public endpoint — returns published posts only.
Admin endpoint — returns all posts regardless of status.

post.summary: Upload a post cover image via the backend (admin only)
Upload a profile picture via the backend (any logged-in user)
Get a presigned R2 URL to upload a post cover image (admin only)
Get a presigned R2 URL to upload a profile picture (any logged-in user)

get.description: Fetch all comments for a post and structure them into a nested tree.

post.description: Create a root-level comment on a post.
Reply to an existing comment. Inherits the post_id from the parent comment.
Toggle a like on a comment. If already liked, unlikes it.

delete.description:
Delete a comment. Ensures only the author or a superuser can delete it.
Also handles cascading deletion of likes and nested replies manually to prevent DB constraint errors.

post.description:
Public endpoint to accept contact form submissions.
Saves the record to the database first, attempts to email the admin,
and updates the email_sent status flag accordingly.

get.description: Public RSS 2.0 feed of published blog posts.
